brand.color_palette_hint: Dark navy/charcoal background with blue accents (per existing brand graphic + profile pic).

instagram_profile.bio: WE come to YOU. Book with us today and support local business serving the GTA📍

contact.note: Bookings via Instagram DM per captions ('Message us to book'). Email/phone/booking URL not provided in IG profile - ask client.

services.name: Exterior Wash
services.blurb: Hand wash, rinse and dry. Wheels and tires included.

services.name: Interior Detail
services.blurb: Full vacuum, surface wipe-down, glass, floor mats.

services.name: Full Detail (Interior + Exterior)
services.blurb: Combined exterior wash and interior detail.

services.name: Premium Detail
services.blurb: Deep interior + exterior with extras like wax and stain treatment.

why_choose_us: Mobile service - we come to you
pricing_disclaimer: Prices may vary depending on vehicle size & condition.

before_after_pairs.label: All-weather floor mats - caked dirt removed

media.subject: interior detail - BMW
media.description: BMW steering wheel and rich brown perforated leather seats. House #40 and a Canadian flag visible through windshield. 'Detail time' text overlay. Premium-looking interior shot.

media.subject: interior - dirty floor mat (Audi Q3)
media.description: Driver footwell of an Audi Q3 showing a heavily soiled rubber 'Q3' floor mat with caked dirt. Black leather seat and dashboard visible. Strong 'before' shot.

media.subject: exterior wash in progress
media.description: First-person view of pressure washer hose and extension cords on a driveway. White car front with Ontario plate BRJC 238 visible at top. Conveys real on-site work.

posts.caption:
Valko’s Detailing is now taking bookings again.

We provide mobile interior and exterior detailing across Toronto using upgraded products and professional-quality service.

Services include:
• Exterior Washes
• Interior Details
• Full Details
• Pet Hair & Stain Removal
• Wax & Exterior Protection

Mobile service — we come directly to you.

Message us to book an appointment or for pricing information.

media.subject: pricing card
media.description: Designed pricing card. Dark background, blue accents. White car-with-sparkles icon. Black BMW sedan on right. Lists services + starting prices and 'Why choose us' bullets. Already on-brand.

media.subject: exterior detail - Hyundai Santa Fe
media.description: Three-quarter front view of a clean dark-grey Hyundai Santa Fe SUV. Suburban street. Crisp wheels and gloss paint.

posts.caption: Book an affordable car detailing today!!! #mobiledetailing #detailingcars #car #cardetailing #scarborough

media.subject: exterior + interior detail - BMW sedan
media.description: Bright blue BMW sedan in a driveway with rear door open showing tan/cream leather interior. Fall foliage. Strong gloss, dark grey wheels. Could anchor a 'full detail' visual.

media.subject: front cabin (driver side) - Ford F-150
media.description: Driver-side door of white Ford F-150 open. Dirty cloth seats and debris on the rocker/sill. Trees in background.

media.subject: floor mats removed on grass
media.description: Two heavily soiled rubber WeatherTech-style floor mats lying on grass beside a crate of cleaning supplies. Shows extraction step.

media.subject: front cabin (driver side) - Ford F-150
media.description: Same Ford F-150 driver-side door open, now clean: vacuumed seats, polished dash, sill wiped down. Matches photo_01.

media.subject: driver footwell with clean mat installed
media.description: Driver footwell with clean black rubber all-weather mat installed. Pairs with photo_02.

media.subject: rear cabin floor
media.description: Rear cabin of F-150: dirty carpet, debris, removed floor mat on the right. Rear bench folded up.

media.subject: rear cabin floor
media.description: Same rear cabin angle, vacuumed and shampooed. Carpet floor mats reinstalled. Matches photo_05.

media.subject: rear cabin from passenger side
media.description: Alternate angle of the cleaned rear cabin from the passenger side. Folded rear bench, clean mats, no debris.

media.subject: front three-quarter exterior - Ford F-150 XLT
media.description: Three-quarter front shot of the finished white Ford F-150 XLT. Clean paint, gloss tires, blue sky. Hero-quality.

media.subject: driver side - Ford F-150 with ladder rack/canopy
media.description: Full driver-side profile of the F-150 work truck with LEER canopy and aluminum ladder rack. Showcases capability with utility trucks.

media.subject: rear three-quarter - Ford F-150 4x4
media.description: Rear three-quarter of the finished F-150 4x4 with LEER canopy. Clean glass and tail lights. Wide sky background.
